name: Flags & Capitals

notes.en: Tap an answer option in the quiz; tap a country card in the Atlas for its info sheet. Keyboard optional (Esc closes a card).
notes.ru: Тапай вариант ответа в викторине; тапай карточку страны в Атласе для справки. Клавиатура опциональна (Esc закрывает карточку).

notes: World geography quiz + reference atlas over all 195 countries (193 UN members + Holy See and State of Palestine, the standard 'complete list of countries' scope). Three multiple-choice modes (flag→country, country→capital, flag→capital) with region-plausible distractors, 15-question scored rounds, and an optional region filter. A searchable/region-filterable Atlas gives every country an info card (flag, name in the current UN-6 language, capital, population, area, languages, currency). All 195 flags are hand-written inline SVG built from geometric primitives (stripes/cross/star/crescent/…) — no bundled image assets; ~64 flags with intricate heraldry render the correct base with a simplified emblem, marked in the data. Country display names are localized to all six UN languages from data/countries.json; capitals are English. High score per mode persists via OGHProfile.
